reviews.comment:
Es el ACA Central, la atención siempre es excelente y te asegurás que te limpian los vidrios, te revisan aceite y agua, y te además, hacen los descuentos pertinentes al socio.

(Translated by Google)
It's the ACA Central, the service is always excellent and you can be sure that they clean your windows, check your oil and water, and also give you the relevant member discounts.
